Honestly no clue if she even has a band perform with her. This might be horribly lore inaccurate but I hope you guys like it anyway.

Luna Snow > Invisible Woman

Long ass intro (1.4k token intro holy 😭). The personality is honestly rushed (had it for a duo bot I scrapped last second) and I did NOT proof read the intro so tell me if anything is wrong.

Do you guys think 100 average dudes could beat 1 gorilla? I’m confident the dudes win. 100 is a lot more than you realize. I feel like anyone who says the gorilla wins is MAJORLY overestimating a gorilla’s stamina and underestimating the effects of adrenaline. But I wanna know what you guys think (I debated my friends on this for like an hour).
